tumblr should become the next-generation flash just like how it became the next-generation pdf
can't believe you're calling tumblr pdf files.........
yeah
it was invented by them but has since gotten a dedicated committee dedicated to maintaining them
why can't there be any big companies that focus on creating the best product in order to make money
yeah basically
i like the screenshots of adobe products where it says you have to pay $300 to cancel a subscription
it was invented in 1993 but made an ISO standardized file type (and thus a generalized thing) in 2008
make good product -> bait people in with good prices -> create an ecosystem that keeps people using it -> enshittification to maximize profit
technically no one can ever "own" a file type though
all a file type means is telling you how the bits in the file should be organized
different programs can utilize different files in different ways
that's how you get like, GTA3 maps stored as .mp3 or something stupid like that
having something be standardized by ISO just means that "this is what should be expected when you use this file"
you never have to stop believing if you never believed in the first place
so that you can make a .png and expect stuff that says "we can open .png files" to do exactly what you think it does
meanwhile other file types (.jmap for example) aren't standard
someone could make something save as a .jmap and even though jtool also uses .jmap files they have no guarantee they work together
tl;dr: adobe never owned .pdf files they just owned the only program that could open them, until other programs were able to open them
yeah I was doing the explanation stuff just so the tl;dr made sense
